title: Buckman
text: Buckman is a prisoner NPC encountered in the dungeons. He is initially found imprisoned in the prison area, near where the player enters the lower dungeons. Buckman provides warnings about nearby dangers and can give the player information about the dungeon layout. He is a non-hostile NPC who may assist or warn the player depending on interactions.

title: Le'garde
text: Le'garde is a central figure in Fear & Hunger lore. He is a prophesied leader who descended into the dungeons seeking the Throne of Ascension. The player's journey is connected to Le'garde's fate. He is a knightly figure with mysterious origins and is referenced throughout the game's backstory.

title: Trortur
text: Trortur is a torturer NPC found in the dungeon's torture chambers. He is a hostile figure associated with the prison area. Trortur is known to be dangerous and represents the brutal nature of the dungeons' inhabitants. He may have unique dialogue or interactions related to the dungeon's secrets.

title: The Girl
text: The Girl is a recruitable NPC found in a cage in the early dungeon. She is a mysterious child who can join the player's party. The Girl has unique abilities and her presence affects certain game events and endings. She is one of the most important NPCs in the game and her fate is tied to multiple story outcomes.

title: Cahara
text: Cahara is a mercenary and one of the playable/recruitable characters. He is motivated by the promise of treasure and coin, venturing into the dungeons for personal gain. Cahara has balanced stats and is proficient with swords and daggers. He can be recruited as a party member if certain conditions are met.

title: D'arce
text: D'arce is a knight of the Kingdom of Rondon and a recruitable character. She descended into the dungeons in search of Le'garde, her commander. D'arce has strong physical stats and proficiency with heavy armor and swords. She is loyal, disciplined, and her personal quest is closely tied to Le'garde's fate.

title: Ragnvaldr
text: Ragnvaldr is an outlander and hunter from the northern tribes. He entered the dungeons seeking vengeance against the monsters and dark forces within. Ragnvaldr has high HP and strength, proficiency with bows and axes, and a unique tracking ability. His backstory involves the destruction of his tribe by dungeon creatures.

title: Enki
text: Enki is a dark priest and scholar who entered the dungeons to study its ancient knowledge and forbidden magic. He is frail physically but possesses powerful magical abilities including necromancy and dark magic. Enki can be recruited as a party member and is essential for unlocking certain magical interactions.

title: Moonless
text: Moonless is a unique wolf-like creature that can join the player's party. She is found in a specific area of the dungeons and can be recruited by offering her food or specific items. Moonless has high agility and powerful bite attacks in combat. She is a loyal animal companion.

title: Pocketcat
text: Pocketcat is a mysterious and unsettling NPC who appears in the dungeons. He is a merchant of sorts who offers unique and often dangerous items. Pocketcat speaks in riddles and his true nature is ambiguous. He is associated with the stranger and more sinister aspects of the dungeon lore.

title: Nosramus
text: Nosramus is an ancient alchemist NPC found deep in the dungeons. He is knowledgeable about the dungeon's secrets, alchemy recipes, and the history of the underground realm. Nosramus provides crucial information and can teach the player alchemical crafting recipes. His role is that of a wise but cryptic guide.
